title: eriostemon banksii
intro: Eriostemon banksii, also known as the Banks' rose or Native Rose, is an evergreen shrub native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Eriostemon banksii include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as being used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or poultice, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
